source_pr.title: ddl: fix data race at the test
source_pr.body:

Problem Summary:


symptoms: Data race in TestTruncatePartitionMultipleTimes (errCount updated in hook, read without atomic load)
failure_signature: Data race on shared errCount (atomic add + non-atomic read) in TestTruncatePartitionMultipleTimes
root_cause_explanation: The test spawns background DDL executions while an `OnJobUpdated` hook increments a shared counter (`errCount`). Previously `errCount` was an `int32` incremented via `atomic.AddInt32`, but later read non-atomically in the main goroutine, which triggers a data race under the race detector. This PR fixes it by switching to `atomic.Int32` and using `Add`/`Load` consistently.
fix_pattern: Use `atomic.Int32` and consistent atomic `Add`/`Load` when a counter is shared between hook callbacks and the main test goroutine.

evidence: evidence: ddl: fix data race at the test
